title: cheilanthes microphylla var. cucullans
intro: Cheilanthes microphylla var. cucullans, commonly known as the 'cup fern', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes microphylla var. cucullans include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and used as a tea, or made into a tincture or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
